author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Warhammer Survivors - Skulls Trailer
Thrust into a universe of relentless war, become the embodiment of bullet hell in Warhammer Survivors, a fast-paced roguelite survivors game. Play as characters from the Warhammer 40,000 and Warhammer: Age of Sigmar universes, collect and upgrade iconic weapons and destroy endless swarms of enemies. Coming 2026 to Xbox Series X|S.

Find out more: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/warhammer-survivors/9mzzwgtf7v65

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
King of Tokyo - Richard Garfield: Launch Trailer
The iconic board game created by the legendary Richard Garfield makes its console debut!

In King of Tokyo, choose your monster, roll the dice, unleash destructive powers and crush your rivals in chaotic monster showdowns. Play solo against the AI or challenge your friends in intense local matches with up to 6 players.

King of Tokyo: available now on XBOX Series X|S
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/king-of-tokyo/9NM9K9W1ZCJW

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 - Purgation Update
Today’s Patch 13 comes with a new PvE mission, a major update to Siege Mode, and whole new sets of weapon and armour cosmetics, both free and paid.

Focus Entertainment and Saber Interactive are excited to announce the release of the Purgation Update for Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 at today’s Warhammer Skulls Festival. Available now free for all Xbox Series, this update brings a host of free content and the long-awaited Iron Hands Chapter Pack.

Discover all there is to know in today’s Purgation Update trailer!

SUBSCRIBE TO XBOX: https://xbx.lv/2EEjmaR
